validation.notes: Favicon URL is a remote URL; the local-favicon ENOENT message from the validator is non-blocking and does not fail the build.

brokenLinks.remediation: Rewrote 16 stale slug patterns (e.g. /framework/fundamentals/* -> /framework/cross-cutting/*, /framework/infrastructure/* -> /framework/background/* and /framework/blob-storing/overview, /framework/messaging/* -> /framework/event-bus/*, /framework/data/repositories -> /framework/ddd/repositories, /framework/ui/theming -> /framework/ui-mvc/themes, /framework/web/aspnet-core/middlewares -> /framework/aspnetcore/overview, /framework/aspnetcore/navigation-menu -> /framework/ui-mvc/navigation, /framework/ui-mvc/bundling -> /framework/aspnetcore/bundling, /framework/background-services/* -> /framework/background/* and /framework/infra/distributed-locking, /framework/http/static-client-proxies -> /framework/http/static-client-proxy, /framework/http/dynamic-client-proxies -> /framework/http/dynamic-client-proxy) across all referencing pages.

childWarnings: Some deep pages slightly over their soft line band (aspects-and-interceptors 296L, exception-handling 270L) because tables/code excerpts would have been mutilated by trimming further.
A few brief pages are 5-30L over their 80L target where the topic genuinely needed a full API table (e.g. global-features, dapper, memory-db, timing).
caching.mdx is 173L vs deep 180L soft floor; content is dense (Mermaid + Redis provider + key normalization tables).
framework/src/Volo.Abp.Ddd.Domain/Volo/Abp/Domain/Repositories/BulkOperations/ does not exist in the repo; documented bulk APIs on the repository interfaces themselves instead.
AbpHttpExceptionStatusCodes constant class does not exist; documented AbpExceptionHttpStatusCodeOptions and AbpExceptionHandlingConsts plus DefaultHttpExceptionStatusCodeFinder mapping.
Some pages in the deep tier (cli-overview, templates/app) come in slightly under the 180L floor by line count but meet semantic depth via large tables and command/project enumerations.
No ng-add schematic exists in npm/ng-packs/packages/schematics; ng-packs/schematics-generators.mdx clarifies that workspaces are scaffolded by `abp new`, not by an ng-add schematic.
An undocumented RecreateInitialMigrationCommand exists in the CLI Commands folder; intentionally omitted from the public command table to match the planned reference surface.
pendingReview: Optional: split aspects-and-interceptors / exception-handling if a hard line cap is desired.
Optional: cross-link audit between flows/* and the deeper subsystem pages they trace.
